title: Ryan McMahon accidentally signs term limits into law (Good Morning CNY)
summary: County Executive Ryan McMahon inadvertently signed term limits legislation into law, according to a Syracuse.com report. This unexpected action has implications for county leadership succession planning and governance structures that warrant review by the Chief Innovation Officer's office.

political_signal.description: Accidental signing of term limits legislation suggests potential governance process gaps or insufficient review procedures before executive signature. May indicate need for improved workflow controls or documentation systems.
